title: Nursery Rhyme. CVII. Proverbs.
content:
Friday night's dream
            On the Saturday told,
        Is sure to come true,
            Be it never so old.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CVII. Proverbs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
